title: pteris aquilina f. esculenta
intro: Pteris aquilina f. esculenta, also known as Chinese brake fern or edible brake fern, is a variety of the Pteris aquilina fern species that is cultivated for its edible fiddleheads. The medicinal properties of Pteris aquilina f. esculenta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Pteris aquilina f. esculenta include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Pteris aquilina f. esculenta can be prepared as a tea, soup, or added to salads, with the fiddleheads typically harvested in the spring when still curled and tender.
